title: Echo Harbor

characters.name: Luna Vale
characters.description: A curious mapmaker searching for memories stored in old harbor crystals.

characters.name: Milo Archive
characters.description: A careful keeper of the floating city's crystal records.

worldRules: Memories can be stored inside glowing crystals, but reading one fades its color.

scenes.title: Arrival at Echo Harbor
scenes.summary: Luna reaches the floating harbor during a crystal storm and follows a fading signal.

scenes.title: The Forgotten Library
scenes.summary: Milo opens a hidden archive and asks Luna to choose which memory to protect.

styleNotes: Soft science fantasy with warm dialogue, gentle mystery, and a hopeful adventure pace.
